case_title: JORGE MARTINEZ VS. VICTOR HUGO PENA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CREPE N'

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JORGE AS TO DEFENDANT VICTOR HUGO PENA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CREPE N' COFFEE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VICTOR HUGO PENA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CREPE N' COFFEE $1,416.89 PRINCIPAL, $1.01 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,642.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
